
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <title>Receipt - POS-2F0B-20260309-0001</title>
    <style>
        * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
        body {
            background-color: #ffffff !important;
            padding: 0;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        .receipt-container {
            font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace;
            font-size: 12px;
            line-height: 1.2;
            padding: 15px;
            width: 80mm;
            background: #ffffff !important;
            color: #000000 !important;
        }
        .text-center { text-align: center !important; }
        .text-right { text-align: right !important; }
        .font-bold { font-weight: bold !important; }
        .separator-double { 
            margin: 10px 0; 
            text-align: center;
            font-weight: bold;
            color: #000 !important;
            letter-spacing: -1px;
        }
        .separator-dashed { 
            margin: 10px 0; 
            text-align: center;
            color: #000 !important;
            letter-spacing: -1px;
        }
        .header { margin-bottom: 12px; }
        .header h1 { 
            font-size: 1.5em; 
            margin: 5px 0; 
            color: #000 !important;
            line-height: 1.1;
        }
        .header p { 
            font-size: 0.95em; 
            margin-bottom: 2px;
            color: #000 !important;
        }
        .order-info {
            margin: 10px 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
            color: #000 !important;
        }
        .items-table { 
            width: 100%; 
            border-collapse: collapse; 
            margin: 10px 0; 
            font-size: 0.95em;
            color: #000 !important;
        }
        .items-table th { 
            border-bottom: 1px dashed #000 !important; 
            padding: 5px 0; 
            text-align: left;
            color: #000 !important;
        }
        .items-table td { 
            padding: 5px 0; 
            vertical-align: top;
            color: #000 !important;
        }
        .totals { 
            margin-top: 8px; 
            color: #000 !important;
        }
        .total-row { 
            display: flex; 
            justify-content: space-between; 
            margin-bottom: 4px; 
            font-size: 1.05em;
            color: #000 !important;
        }
        .grand-total { 
            font-size: 1.3em; 
            font-weight: bold !important; 
            margin-top: 8px; 
            padding-top: 8px; 
            color: #000 !important;
        }
        .footer { 
            margin-top: 20px; 
            font-size: 1em;
            color: #000 !important;
        }
        .review-qr { margin: 15px 0; }
        .review-qr img { width: 100px; height: 100px; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="receipt-container">
        <div class="header text-center">
            <div class="separator-double">=======================================</div>
            <h1>MAIN BRANCH</h1>
            <p></p>
            <p>123 Main Street, Demo City, DC, 12345, USA</p>
            <p>Tel: +1234567890</p>
            
            
            <div class="separator-double">=======================================</div>
        </div>

        <div class="order-info">
            <div style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 10px;">
                <div style="flex: 1; min-width: 150px;">Bill No : POS-2F0B-20260309-0001</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                <div>Date : 03/09/2026</div>
                <div>Time : 12:30:50 PM</div>
            </div>
            <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                <div>Table : N/A</div>
                <div>Waiter: Jane Manager</div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="separator-dashed">---------------------------------------</div>

        <table class="items-table">
            <thead>
                <tr>
                    <th style="width: 10%;">Qty</th>
                    <th style="width: 50%;">Item</th>
                    <th style="width: 20%; text-align: right;">Rate</th>
                    <th style="width: 20%; text-align: right;">Amount</th>
                </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
                
        <tr>
            <td>1</td>
            <td>Coffee</td>
            <td class="text-right">4</td>
            <td class="text-right">4</td>
        </tr>
        
      
        <tr>
            <td>1</td>
            <td>Caesar Salad</td>
            <td class="text-right">12</td>
            <td class="text-right">12</td>
        </tr>
        
      
        <tr>
            <td>1</td>
            <td>Beef Steak</td>
            <td class="text-right">30</td>
            <td class="text-right">30</td>
        </tr>
        
      
        <tr>
            <td>1</td>
            <td>Chicken Wings</td>
            <td class="text-right">13</td>
            <td class="text-right">13</td>
        </tr>
        
      
        <tr>
            <td>1</td>
            <td>Ice Cream</td>
            <td class="text-right">5</td>
            <td class="text-right">5</td>
        </tr>
        
      
            </tbody>
        </table>

        <div class="separator-dashed">---------------------------------------</div>

        <div class="totals">
            <div class="total-row">
                <span>Subtotal :</span>
                <span>63.95</span>
            </div>
            
    <div class="total-row">
        <span>VAT (1.5%) :</span>
        <span>0.96</span>
    </div>
            
    <div class="total-row">
        <span>S.C (0.02%) :</span>
        <span>0.01</span>
    </div>
            
            
            
            <div class="separator-double">=======================================</div>
            <div class="total-row grand-total">
                <span>GRAND TOTAL (BDT) :</span>
                <span>64.92</span>
            </div>
            <div class="separator-double">=======================================</div>
        </div>

        <div class="payment-details">
            <div>Paid by: CASH</div>
            <div>Change: 0.00 (Tendered: 65)</div>
        </div>

        <div class="separator-double" style="margin-top: 15px;">=======================================</div>

        <div class="footer text-center">
            <p>Thank you for your visit!</p>
            <p>Please come again.</p>
            <br/>
            <p style="font-size: 0.8em; opacity: 0.8;">Powered by Raha Pos Solutions</p>
            <div class="separator-double">=======================================</div>
        </div>

        
    <div class="review-qr text-center" style="width: 100%;">
        <p style="font-size: 0.8em; margin-bottom: 5px; color: #000 !important;">Scan to review your experience</p>
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Review QR" style="display: block; margin: 0 auto; width: 120px; height: 120px;" />
    </div>
    </div>
</body>
</html>
